title: Create: Recipes
description: More recipes to help automation of the create mod and enchantment industry addon
body:
This mods gives more recipes to create like automation of lapis and more!
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4381831b45cd65bdce9073fbfcd67d9cc957348f.png)

With this mod you can achieve automation of hyper experience

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Current recipes are:

Lapis lazuli - blue dye and xp from a spout (you need enchantment industry mod)

blue dye and xp - disenchant lapis lazuli (you need enchantment industry mod again...)

leather - smoke rotten flesh by smoker or a fan

Ores (Currently just diamond ores) - mix stone or deepslate with the ingot or diamond. superheat





And a secret command with a advancment : )



That all now but will be more recipes soon...
